column1: a MO-604 covers territory in both Missouri and Kansas. The record described in this file represents the CoC's total territory, the sum of the point-in-time estimates the CoC separately reported for the portions of its territory in MO and in KS. However, in the companion file, Point-in-Time Estimates by State, MO-604's data have been split up between MO and KS.
